expectations.evidence: Uses getByLabel/getByRole generic patterns, not shadcn-specific combobox trigger
Has [role='option'] in a fallback selector chain with listbox and ul.dropdown-menu
No explicit debounce wait — just waits for dropdown visibility

expectations.text: Verifies actual price VALUE (not just existence)
expectations.evidence: Checks if price field exists and is not empty, but doesn't verify specific value like 42.35
No toast reading pattern — checks URL change only
